title: Files should not be too complex
description: Avoid complex files as they are harder to understand and maintain.
recommendation: Refactor complex code into smaller, more manageable functions or modules.

compliant.description: A function with a reasonable number of parameters

why_is_this_an_issue: Complex files are harder to understand and maintain, increasing the risk of errors.
how_to_fix: Refactor complex code into smaller, more manageable functions or modules.
